	Call cb 05 00 00 // ProcessType[[]uintptr]
	Return 
// 0x791: ProcessType[runtime.mTraceState]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 2d 05 00 00 // ProcessType[[2][2]*runtime.traceBuf]
	Call bd 04 00 00 // ProcessType[*runtime.m]
	Return 
// 0x7a1: ProcessType[string]
	ProcessString 7e 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x7a7: ProcessType[table<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call d7 05 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x7b2: ProcessType[table<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call e3 05 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x7bd: ProcessType[table<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call ef 05 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x7c8: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call fb 05 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// Extra illegal ops to simplify code bound checks
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal 
	Illegal
